languages.text: "Потому что мы всегда сражаемся. Вопреки всему. Я знаю, что это ничего не изменит, но разве это повод не биться против неизбежного?"
"Because we must always fight, against all the odds. I know it won't change a thing, but is that any reason to stop fighting against the inevitable?"
languages.original_text: "Потому что мы всегда сражаемся. Вопреки всему. Я знаю, что это ничего не изменит, но разве это повод не биться против неизбежного?"

traits.locale_text: "Because we always fight. Against all odds. I know it's futile, but is futility a reason to stop defying the inevitable?"
"Because we must always fight, against all the odds. I know it's not necessary, but is that any reason to stop fighting against the inevitable?"
"Ah, if only that were true. I told you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'm just protecting all these people. It's nothing personal. You have my respect."
"Because we always fight. Against all odds. I know it's futile, but is futility a reason to stop defying the inevitable?"
"Because we must always fight, against all the odds. I know it's not necessary, but is that any reason to stop fighting against the inevitable?"
"Because we must always fight, against all the odds. I know it won't change a thing, but is that any reason to stop fighting against the inevitable?"

languages.text: 「ああ、そうだと良いのに。言ったでしょう、貴方様。私はただこの人たちを守っているだけです。個人的な恨みはありません。敬意を表します。」
languages.original_text: "Ah, if only that were true. I told you, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}. I'm just protecting all these people. It's nothing personal. You have my respect."

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、そうだと良いのに。言ったでしょう、貴方様。私はただこの人たちを守っているだけです。個人的な恨みはありません。敬意を表します。」

languages.text: « Car nous devons toujours nous battre, quel qu'en soit le prix. Certes, rien ne nous y oblige, mais est-ce une raison suffisante pour refuser de se dresser contre le sort ? »
languages.original_text: "Because we must always fight, against all the odds. I know it's not necessary, but is that any reason to stop fighting against the inevitable?"

traits.locale_text: « Car nous devons toujours nous battre, quel qu'en soit le prix. Certes, rien ne nous y oblige, mais est-ce une raison suffisante pour refuser de se dresser contre le sort ? »

languages.text: "Çünkü her şeye rağmen her zaman savaşmalıyız. Bunun gerekli olmadığını biliyorum ama bu, kaçınılmaz olana karşı savaşmayı bırakmak için bir neden olabilir mi?"
languages.original_text: "Because we must always fight, against all the odds. I know it's not necessary, but is that any reason to stop fighting against the inevitable?"

traits.locale_text: "Çünkü her şeye rağmen her zaman savaşmalıyız. Bunun gerekli olmadığını biliyorum ama bu, kaçınılmaz olana karşı savaşmayı bırakmak için bir neden olabilir mi?"

languages.text: "Weil wir immer kämpfen müssen, gegen jede Chance. Ich weiß, es ist nicht nötig, aber ist das ein Grund, den Kampf gegen das Unvermeidliche einzustellen?"
languages.original_text: "Because we must always fight, against all the odds. I know it's not necessary, but is that any reason to stop fighting against the inevitable?"

traits.locale_text: "Weil wir immer kämpfen müssen, gegen jede Chance. Ich weiß, es ist nicht nötig, aber ist das ein Grund, den Kampf gegen das Unvermeidliche einzustellen?"

languages.text: «Porque siempre debemos luchar, aunque todo esté en nuestra contra. Sé que no es necesario, pero ¿es eso motivo para dejar de rebelarse contra lo inevitable?».
languages.original_text: "Because we must always fight, against all the odds. I know it's not necessary, but is that any reason to stop fighting against the inevitable?"

traits.locale_text: «Porque siempre debemos luchar, aunque todo esté en nuestra contra. Sé que no es necesario, pero ¿es eso motivo para dejar de rebelarse contra lo inevitable?».

languages.text: “因为我们必须战斗下去，哪怕希望渺茫。我知道这并非必要，但难道就该因此停止反抗宿命吗？”
languages.original_text: "Because we must always fight, against all the odds. I know it's not necessary, but is that any reason to stop fighting against the inevitable?"

traits.locale_text: “因为我们必须战斗下去，哪怕希望渺茫。我知道这并非必要，但难道就该因此停止反抗宿命吗？”
